race.comment: A host of win chances but the Stokes yard have a good hand in the race. ANDREFI (7) turned in an eye-catching run in town second-up, storming home from the back and finishing a close-up fifth. Draws wide again but back a notch and up in trip. Looks tough to stop with even luck. Stablemate PATANJALI (11) returned from a break and was having just her second start producing a run worth following up. Settled midfield but got home strongly over the sharper dash and finished this. Fitter and looks suited by the extra ground. THINK LU BELLA (12) was beaten a nose fresh then strongly back but below best last time over 1600m. Fitter and better than that. Worth another chance. PAGANINI (2) was safely held in the same race as ANDREFI last time but the start prior was close to a win. This is easier and capable of sharp improvement. FAITH'SACRACKER (9) was safely held in a Class 1 over further last time but back in grade and trip.
